messages: Hi omar , me and my partner have a wedding in fifth settelment , and the apartment is good choice for us
Yeah ofc
Where can i send it for you ?
Ok

Here is our ID 
Tell me if you need any further information

The ID photos i just sent for you is not enough , 
You need the passport copies too ?
Ok 🤗

Hi,

Thank you so much for the warm welcome 🤎 
I’m really enjoying my stay — the apartment is beautiful and very comfortable, it truly feels like home.

I really appreciate everything, and I’ll definitely let you know if I need anything.

Warm regards, 
Radwan

Hi,

I just wanted to mention something and apologize in advance. 
I had to use two towels on the bathroom floor because some water was getting outside, and there seems to be a slight leak under the toilet.

I’m really sorry for using them this way, and I hope that’s okay. Just wanted to let you know.

Thank you so much for your understanding 🤎 
Radwan
Good Morning

I will to booking

Reservation for a man and his wife. If we want a guest to visit them, there is no problem.

Hi
